summary: INCOMPLETE DELIVERABLE. Critical omissions: (1) NO test files despite TDD being explicitly required—task says 'write a failing test FIRST' but zero tests provided; (2) label-config.json missing (referenced in workflow & code); (3) priority field defined in LabelRule (label-assigner.ts line 26) but never used in assignLabels logic (dead code); (4) Workflow does NOT meet requirements: no act test harness, no act-result.txt generation, actions unpinned to SHA (actions/checkout@v4, oven-sh/setup-bun@v1 security issue), CLI test steps don't validate output (just run commands blindly); (5) Missing actionlint validation results and act execution proof. Scripts have good structure & readability, but untestable without test files and unmaintainable without test coverage.
